---
name: Question
about: Not sure how something works, or need a hand getting set up?
title: "[Question] "
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## What is your question?

Go ahead — no question is too basic. If you are stuck, someone else probably is too.

## What are you trying to do?

A bit of context helps me give a useful answer rather than a generic one. Are you setting up a new manuscript, configuring IIIF sources, managing access, or something else?

## What have you already tried?

Have you looked through existing issues or had a go at solving them yourself? Let me know where you got stuck.

## Environment (if relevant)

- **Browser and version:** (e.g. Firefox 124, Chrome 123)
- **How is Manu deployed?** (manu.is, docker)

## Anything else?

Screenshots, error messages, or links to relevant docs, all that helps me understand your setup.
